user.title: Add an Airmonitor App Extension
user.description: Enter the device's Wi-Fi MAC address. Auto-discovery via MQTT happens whenever the shim publishes a presence message to `qpext/<mac>/info`; this manual form is for cases when the device hasn't talked to the broker yet. With or without separators — e.g. 58:2D:34:70:A8:73 or 582D3470A873.

discovery_confirm.title: Discovered Airmonitor App Extension

abort.already_configured: A device with this MAC is already configured.
abort.invalid_discovery_topic: The discovery topic is not in the expected qpext/<mac>/info form.

init.title: Airmonitor App Extension dashboard
init.description: Add, edit or remove widgets shown on the device's HA tab. Triggers map HA events to a tab switch on the device. Cameras add an RTSP-based tab (hidden when no cameras are configured).

add_entity_widget.title: New {widget_type} widget
add_entity_widget.description: Pick an HA entity, optionally label and icon. Appearance fields (sizes / colors) are optional — leave at 0 / blank to keep the widget's defaults. Colors accept `#rgb`, `#rrggbb`, or CSS names.

add_button.title: New button widget
add_button.description: A button widget calls a HA service when tapped. Data is an optional JSON object passed as service data (e.g. {"entity_id": "switch.foo"}). Appearance fields are optional.

cameras_menu.title: Cameras
cameras_menu.description: Cameras feed into the device's RTSP tab via gst-launch + Rockchip MPP hw decode. The tab is hidden entirely when no cameras are configured.

add_camera.title: Add a camera
add_camera.description: RTSP URL with embedded credentials. Width is the JPEG width (lower → faster encode); fps is the target frame rate. Name must be unique and is used as the on-device filename for snapshots.

edit_camera_form.title: Edit camera
edit_camera_form.description:
Current URL: {redacted}

Retype the full RTSP URL to change credentials; leave as-is otherwise.

events_menu.title: Triggers
events_menu.description: When an HA entity changes state (typically an `automation` firing), switch the device to a given tab.

error.data_invalid_json: Service data must be valid JSON.
error.data_not_object: Service data must be a JSON object (e.g. {"entity_id": "…"}).
error.name_taken: A camera with this name already exists.

republish.name: Re-publish dashboard
republish.description: Re-publish the current widget composition to MQTT (useful after the device was wiped or the broker lost its retained message).
